(** * Definition of preadditive categories. *)
(** ** Contents
- Definition of preadditive categories [PreAdditive]
- Zero and unit element coincide
- Composition and inverses
- KernelIn, CokernelOut, and binary operations
- Quotient of PreAdditive
 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Local Open Scope cat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Local Open Scope addmonoid.

(** * Definition of a PreAdditive precategory
   A preadditive precategory is a precategory such that the sets of morphisms are abelian groups and
   pre- and postcomposing with a morphisms is a monoidfun of the abelian groups. *)
Section def_preadditive.

  (** In preadditive category precomposition and postcomposition for any
      morphism yields a morphism of abelian groups. Classically one says that
      composition is bilinear with respect to the abelian groups? *)
  Definition isPreAdditive (PA : categoryWithAbgrops) : UU :=
    (∏ (x y z : PA) (f : x --> y), ismonoidfun (to_premor z f))
      × (∏ (x y z : PA) (f : y --> z), ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)).

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
isPreAdditive PA

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
isPreAdditive PA

    exact (H1,,H2).
  Defined.

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
isPreAdditive PA

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
isPreAdditive PA

    
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)

∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)

H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z

f · to_binop y z g h =

(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),

H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z

PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ _ : isbinopfun (to_premor z f),
 to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat) ?pr1

      
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor z f)
 
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: (y --> z)%abgrcat
to_premor z f (g + h) =
to_premor z f g + to_premor z f h
 exact (H1 x y z f g h).
      
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ _ : isbinopfun (to_premor z f),
 to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat)
  ((λ g h : (y --> z)%abgrcat, H1 x y z f g h)
   :
   isbinopfun (to_premor z f))
 exact (H1' x y z f).

H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),

to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)

∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: (x --> y)%abgrcat
to_postmor x f (g + h) =
to_postmor x f g + to_postmor x f h
 exact (H2 x y z f g h).
      
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H1: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
H1': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧), to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
H2: ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : PA ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f =
to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
H2': ∏ (x y z : PA) (f : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧), to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
(λ _ : isbinopfun (to_postmor x f),
 to_postmor x f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat)
  ((λ g h : (x --> y)%abgrcat, H2 x y z f g h)
   :
   isbinopfun (to_postmor x f))
 exact (H2' x y z f).
  Qed.

  Definition to_premor_monoid {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA) :
    ∏ (x y z : PWA) (f : x --> y), ismonoidfun (to_premor z f) := dirprod_pr1 iPA.

  Definition to_postmor_monoid {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA) :
    ∏ (x y z : PWA) (f : y --> z), ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f) := dirprod_pr2 iPA.

  Definition to_premor_monoidfun {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA)
             (x y z : PWA) (f : x --> y) : monoidfun (to_abgr y z) (to_abgr x z) :=
    make_monoidfun (to_premor_monoid iPA x y z f).

  Definition to_premor_abelian_group_morphism {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA)
             (x y z : PWA) (f : x --> y) : abelian_group_morphism (to_abgr y z) (to_abgr x z) :=
    binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism (to_premor_monoidfun iPA x y z f).

  Definition to_postmor_monoidfun {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA)
             (x y z : PWA) (f : y --> z) : monoidfun (to_abgr x y) (to_abgr x z) :=
    make_monoidfun (to_postmor_monoid iPA x y z f).

  Definition to_postmor_abelian_group_morphism {PWA : categoryWithAbgrops} (iPA : isPreAdditive PWA)
             (x y z : PWA) (f : y --> z) : abelian_group_morphism (to_abgr x y) (to_abgr x z) :=
    binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism (to_postmor_monoidfun iPA x y z f).

  (** Definition of preadditive categories *)
  Definition PreAdditive : UU := ∑ PA : categoryWithAbgrops, isPreAdditive PA.

  Definition PreAdditive_categoryWithAbgrops (A : PreAdditive) : categoryWithAbgrops := pr1 A.
  Coercion PreAdditive_categoryWithAbgrops : PreAdditive >-> categoryWithAbgrops.

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H: isPreAdditive PA
PreAdditive

  
PA: categoryWithAbgrops
H: isPreAdditive PA
PreAdditive

    exact (tpair _ PA H).
  Defined.

  Definition PreAdditive_isPreAdditive (A : PreAdditive) : isPreAdditive A := pr2 A.
  Coercion PreAdditive_isPreAdditive : PreAdditive >-> isPreAdditive.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.

  (** The following give that premor and postmor are linear. *)
  Definition to_premor_linear {x y : A} (z : A) (f : x --> y) :
    isbinopfun (to_premor z f) := dirprod_pr1 (to_premor_monoid A x y z f).

  Definition to_postmor_linear (x : A) {y z : A} (f : y --> z) :
    isbinopfun (to_postmor x f) := dirprod_pr1 (to_postmor_monoid A x y z f).

  (** Following versions are useful when one wants to rewrite equations *)
  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

    apply to_premor_linear.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
g, h: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
g, h: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)

    apply to_postmor_linear.
  Qed.

  (** The following says that composing with zero object yields a zero object. *)
  Definition to_premor_unel {x y : A} (z : A) (f : x --> y) :
    to_premor z f 1%multmonoid = 1%multmonoid := dirprod_pr2 (to_premor_monoid A x y z f).

  Definition to_postmor_unel (x : A) {y z : A} (f : y --> z) :
    to_postmor x f 1%multmonoid = 1%multmonoid := dirprod_pr2 (to_postmor_monoid A x y z f).

  (** Following versions are useful when one wants to rewrite equations *)
  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · to_unel y z = to_unel x z

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · to_unel y z = to_unel x z

    apply to_premor_unel.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_unel x y · f = to_unel x z

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_unel x y · f = to_unel x z

    apply to_postmor_unel.
  Qed.

End def_preadditive.
Arguments to_premor_linear [A] [x] [y] _ _ _ _.
Arguments to_postmor_linear [A] _ [y] [z] _ _ _.
Arguments to_premor_linear' [A] [x] [y] [z] _ _ _.
Arguments to_postmor_linear' [A] [x] [y] [z] _ _ _.


(** * Zero and unit
   In the following section we prove that if a preadditive category has a zero
   object, then in a homset the unit element is given by the zero arrow *)
Section preadditive_with_zero.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.

  (** Proof that the zero arrow and the unit element coincide *)
  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_unel x y = ZeroArrow Z x y

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_unel x y = ZeroArrow Z x y

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_unel x y = ZeroArrowTo x · ZeroArrowFrom y

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (identity Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
identity Z = to_unel Z Z
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
X: identity Z = to_unel Z Z
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (identity Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
identity Z = to_unel Z Z
 apply ZeroEndo_is_identity. 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
X: identity Z = to_unel Z Z
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (identity Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
X: identity Z = to_unel Z Z
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (to_unel Z Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (to_unel Z Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)


    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y:= to_postmor_unel A Z (ZeroArrowFrom y): to_postmor Z (ZeroArrowFrom y) 0%abgrcat =
0%abgrcat
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (to_unel Z Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y:= to_postmor_unel A Z (ZeroArrowFrom y): 0%abgrcat · ZeroArrowFrom y = 0%abgrcat
to_unel x y =
ZeroArrowTo x · (to_unel Z Z · ZeroArrowFrom y)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y:= to_postmor_unel A Z (ZeroArrowFrom y): 0%abgrcat · ZeroArrowFrom y = 0%abgrcat
0%abgrcat =
ZeroArrowTo x · (0%abgrcat · ZeroArrowFrom y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y:= to_postmor_unel A Z (ZeroArrowFrom y): 0%abgrcat · ZeroArrowFrom y = 0%abgrcat
0%abgrcat = ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
0%abgrcat = ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat


    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y':= to_premor_unel A y (ZeroArrowTo x): to_premor y (ZeroArrowTo x) 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
0%abgrcat = ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y':= to_premor_unel A y (ZeroArrowTo x): ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
0%abgrcat = ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
Y':= to_premor_unel A y (ZeroArrowTo x): ZeroArrowTo x · 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat


    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y (ZeroArrow Z x y) f = f

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y (ZeroArrow Z x y) f = f

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y (ZeroArrow Z x y) f =
to_binop x y (to_unel x y) f
 apply maponpaths_2, pathsinv0, PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y f (ZeroArrow Z x y) = f

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y f (ZeroArrow Z x y) = f

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y f (ZeroArrow Z x y) =
to_binop x y f (to_unel x y)
 apply maponpaths, pathsinv0, PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y (to_inv f) f = ZeroArrow Z x y

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y (to_inv f) f = ZeroArrow Z x y

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_unel x y = ZeroArrow Z x y
 apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y f (to_inv f) = ZeroArrow Z x y

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y f (to_inv f) = ZeroArrow Z x y

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_unel x y = ZeroArrow Z x y
 apply PreAdditive_unel_zero.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_inv (ZeroArrow Z x y) = ZeroArrow Z x y

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_inv (ZeroArrow Z x y) = ZeroArrow Z x y

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y: A
to_inv (to_unel x y) = to_unel x y

    apply to_inv_unel.
  Qed.

End preadditive_with_zero.


(** * Inverses and composition
   Some equations on inverses in PreAdditive categories *)
Section preadditive_inv_comp.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) = to_inv f · g

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) = to_inv f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) + f · g = to_inv f · g + f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
( - (f · g)%cat)%abgrcat + f · g =
to_inv f · g + f · g
 
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = to_inv f · g + f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = to_binop x y (to_inv f) f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = to_unel x y · g
 
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = to_unel x z

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) = f · to_inv g

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) = f · to_inv g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_inv (f · g) + f · g = f · to_inv g + f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
( - (f · g)%cat)%abgrcat + f · g =
f · to_inv g + f · g
 
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = f · to_inv g + f · g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = f · to_binop y z (to_inv g) g

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = f · to_unel y z
 
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = to_unel x z

    
A: PreAdditive
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y: A
f, g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: to_inv f = to_inv g
f = g

  
A: PreAdditive
x, y: A
f, g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: to_inv f = to_inv g
f = g

    apply (grinvmaponpathsinv (to_abgr x y) H).
  Qed.

End preadditive_inv_comp.


(** * KernelIn, CokernelOut, and Binary Operations *)
(** ** Introduction
   In this section we show that binop commutes with KernelIn and CokernelOut in a PreAdditive
   category. [KernelInOp] proves commutativity for KernelIn and [CokernelOutOp] proves commutativity
   for CokernelOut.
*)
Section def_additive_kernel_cokernel.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.
  Variable Z : Zero A.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (f1 · g) (f2 · g) = ZeroArrow Z x z
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (ZeroArrow Z x z) (f2 · g) =
ZeroArrow Z x z
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (ZeroArrow Z x z) (ZeroArrow Z x z) =
ZeroArrow Z x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (to_unel x z) (to_unel x z) = to_unel x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_unel x z = to_unel x z
 apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
KernelIn Z K x (to_binop x y f1 f2)
  (KernelInOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1)
  (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2)

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
KernelIn Z K x (to_binop x y f1 f2)
  (KernelInOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1)
  (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
KernelIn Z K x (to_binop x y f1 f2)
  (KernelInOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) · KernelArrow K =
to_binop x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1)
  (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2) · KernelArrow K

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 =
to_binop x K (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1)
  (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2) · KernelArrow K

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 =
to_binop x y (KernelIn Z K x f1 H1 · KernelArrow K)
  (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2 · KernelArrow K)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 =
to_binop x y f1 (KernelIn Z K x f2 H2 · KernelArrow K)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
K: Kernel Z g
H1: f1 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: f2 · g = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x y f1 f2 = to_binop x y f1 f2

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
g · to_binop y z f1 f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
g · to_binop y z f1 f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (g · f1) (g · f2) = ZeroArrow Z x z
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (ZeroArrow Z x z) (g · f2) =
ZeroArrow Z x z
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (ZeroArrow Z x z) (ZeroArrow Z x z) =
ZeroArrow Z x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop x z (to_unel x z) (to_unel x z) = to_unel x z

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_unel x z = to_unel x z
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
CokernelOut Z CK z (to_binop y z f1 f2)
  (CokernelOutOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1)
  (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
CokernelOut Z CK z (to_binop y z f1 f2)
  (CokernelOutOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
to_binop CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1)
  (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
CokernelArrow CK
· CokernelOut Z CK z (to_binop y z f1 f2)
    (CokernelOutOp_Eq f1 f2 g H1 H2) =
CokernelArrow CK
· to_binop CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1)
    (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop y z f1 f2 =
CokernelArrow CK
· to_binop CK z (CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1)
    (CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop y z f1 f2 =
to_binop y z
  (CokernelArrow CK · CokernelOut Z CK z f1 H1)
  (CokernelArrow CK · CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop y z f1 f2 =
to_binop y z f1
  (CokernelArrow CK · CokernelOut Z CK z f2 H2)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
x, y, z: A
f1, f2: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
CK: Cokernel Z g
H1: g · f1 = ZeroArrow Z x z
H2: g · f2 = ZeroArrow Z x z
to_binop y z f1 f2 = to_binop y z f1 f2

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

End def_additive_kernel_cokernel.


Section monics_and_epis_in_preadditive.

  Variable PA : PreAdditive.

  
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
isMonic (to_inv f)

  
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
isMonic (to_inv f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
∏ (x0 : PA) (g h : PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧),
g · to_inv f = h · to_inv f → g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧
X: g · to_inv f = h · to_inv f
g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧
X: to_inv (g · f) = h · to_inv f
g = h
 
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧
X: to_inv (g · f) = to_inv (h · f)
g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
g = h
 
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ x0, x ⟧
X: g · f = h · f
g · f = h · f
 exact X.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
isEpi (to_inv f)

  
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
isEpi (to_inv f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
∏ (z : PA) (g h : PA ⟦ y, z ⟧),
to_inv f · g = to_inv f · h → g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ y, x0 ⟧
X: to_inv f · g = to_inv f · h
g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ y, x0 ⟧
X: to_inv (f · g) = to_inv f · h
g = h
 
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ y, x0 ⟧
X: to_inv (f · g) = to_inv (f · h)
g = h

    
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ y, x0 ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
g = h
 
PA: PreAdditive
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
x0: PA
g, h: PA ⟦ y, x0 ⟧
X: f · g = f · h
f · g = f · h
 exact X.
  Qed.

End monics_and_epis_in_preadditive.


(** * Quotient of homsets
   Suppose you have a subgroup for each set of morphisms such that pre- and postcompositions map
   morphisms in a subgroup to another subgroup. Then one can form a new Preadditive category by
   taking the same objects and morphisms as elements of the quotient groups. We call this
   [PreAdditiveQuot]. An example of this construction is when one wants to form the naive homotopy
   category from a category of complexes. *)
Section preadditive_quotient.

  Variable PA : PreAdditive.

  Local Opaque ishinh.

  (** For every set morphisms we have a subgroup. *)
  Definition PreAdditiveSubabgrs : UU := ∏ (x y : ob PA), @subabgr (to_abgr x y).

  Hypothesis PAS : PreAdditiveSubabgrs.

  (** Pre- and postcomposing with an element in the subgroups gives an element of a subgroup.
      This is important since we want pre- and postcomposition with unit element to be
      the unit element in the new precategory. *)
  Definition PreAdditiveComps : UU :=
    ∏ (x y : ob PA),
    (∏ (z : ob PA) (f : x --> y)
       (inf : pr1submonoid (@to_abgr PA x y) (PAS x y) f) (g : y --> z),
     pr1submonoid (@to_abgr PA x z) (PAS x z) (f · g))
      × (∏ (z : ob PA) (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z)
           (ing : pr1submonoid (@to_abgr PA y z) (PAS y z) g),
         pr1submonoid (@to_abgr PA x z) (PAS x z) (f · g)).

  Hypothesis PAC : PreAdditiveComps.

  (** ** Here are some random results copied from category_abgr.v.
     Theses should be deleted, removed, renamed, generalized, or ...*)

  (** The hProp which tells if two elements of A belong to the same equivalence class in A/B *)
  Definition subgrhrel_hprop {A : gr} (B : @subgr A) (a1 a2 : A) : hProp :=
    hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 * grinv A a2)%multmonoid).

  (** Construct a relation using the above hProp *)
  Definition subgrhrel {A : gr} (B : @subgr A) : @hrel A :=
    (λ a1 : A, λ a2 : A, (subgrhrel_hprop B a1 a2)).

  (** Let B be a subgroup of A. Then the canonical map A -> A/B is a monoidfun. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
ismonoidfun (λ a : A, setquotpr H a)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
ismonoidfun (λ a : A, setquotpr H a)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
isbinopfun (λ a : A, setquotpr H a)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
setquotpr H 0 = 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
isbinopfun (λ a : A, setquotpr H a)
 split.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
setquotpr H 0 = 0
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
e: f = g
∏ x : X, f x = g x

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
e: f = g
∏ x : X, f x = g x

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
∏ x : X, f x = f x
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
f x = f x
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Local Definition abgrquotpr_monoidfun {A : abgr} (H : @binopeqrel A) : monoidfun A (abgrquot H) :=
    make_monoidfun (abgrquotpr_ismonoidfun H).

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f (- a)%abgr = (- f a)%abgr

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f (- a)%abgr = (- f a)%abgr

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f a + f (- a)%abgr = (f a - f a)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f a + f (- a)%abgr = 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f (a - a)%abgr = 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: abgr
f: monoidfun A B
a: A
f 0 = 0
 apply (pr2 (pr2 f)).
  Qed.

  (** The relation we defined is an equivalence relation *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
iseqrel (subgrhrel B)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
iseqrel (subgrhrel B)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
iseqrel (λ a1 a2 : A, subgrhrel_hprop B a1 a2)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
iseqrel
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
istrans
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
isrefl
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
issymm
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))

    (* istrans *)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs

istrans
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))

t: B
p: pr1 t = (x1 - x2)%abgr
t0: B
p0: pr1 t0 = (x2 - x3)%abgr
x1 = x1

        apply idpath.

isrefl
  (λ a1 a2 : A,
   hexists (λ b : B, pr1 b = (a1 - a2)%abgr))

pr1 (hexists (λ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
H': ∑ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (x - y)%abgr
pr1 (hexists (λ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
H': ∑ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (x - y)%abgr
∑ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
∑ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
pr1 B
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
(λ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr) ?pr1

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
pr1 B
 exact (grinv B t).
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
(λ b : pr1 B, pr1 b = (y - x)%abgr) (- t)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
(- pr1 t)%abgr = (y - x)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
p: pr1 t = (x - y)%abgr
(- (x - y))%abgr = (y - x)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
(- (x - y))%abgr = (y - x)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
(- - y - x)%abgr = (y - x)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: gr
B: subgr A
x, y: A
t: pr1 B
(y - x)%abgr = (y - x)%abgr
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** The relation we defined respects binary operations. Note that we use commax, thus the proof
      does not work for nonabelian groups. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
isbinophrel
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B))

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
isbinophrel
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
iscomm op
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
∏ a b c : A,
make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a b
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
    (c + a) (c + b)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
iscomm op
 apply (pr2 (pr2 A)).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
∏ a b c : A,
make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a b
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
    (c + a) (c + b)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
  (c + a) (c + b)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
  (c + a) (c + b)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr)
→ pr1
    (make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
       (c + a) (c + b))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
pr1
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)
     (c + a) (c + b))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
B
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
(λ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr) ?pr1

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
B
 exact (pr1 X'').
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
(λ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr) (pr1 X'')
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
pr11 X'' = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
tmp:= pr2 X'': (λ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr) (pr1 X'')
pr11 X'' = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
tmp:= pr2 X'': pr11 X'' = (a - b)%abgr
pr11 X'' = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
tmp:= pr2 X'': pr11 X'' = (a - b)%abgr
(a - b)%abgr = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
X'': ∑ b0 : B, pr1 b0 = (a - b)%abgr
(a - b)%abgr = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = (c + a - (c + b))%abgr

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = c + a + (- b - c)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = a + c + (- b - c)%abgr
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = a + (c + (- b - c)%abgr)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = a + ((- b - c)%abgr + c)

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = a + ((- b)%abgr + ((- c)%abgr + c))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = a + ((- b)%abgr + 0)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
a, b, c: A
X: make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B) a
  b
(a - b)%abgr = (a - b)%abgr
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Thus the relation is a binopeqrel *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
binopeqrel A

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
binopeqrel A

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
eqrel A
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
isbinophrel ?t

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
eqrel A
 exact (make_eqrel _ (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B)).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
B: subabgr A
isbinophrel
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel B) (iseqrel_subgrhrel A B))
 exact (isbinopeqrel_subgr_eqrel B).
  Defined.

  (** These are the homsets in our new category. *)
  Definition subabgr_quot {A : abgr} (B : @subabgr A) : abgr :=
    abgrquot (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel B).

  Definition Quotcategory_homsets (c d : ob PA) : abgr := subabgr_quot (PAS c d).

  Definition Quotcategory_ob_mor : precategory_ob_mor :=
    tpair (λ ob : UU, ob -> ob -> UU) (ob PA) (λ A B : ob PA, Quotcategory_homsets A B).

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
c, d: Quotcategory_ob_mor
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ c, d ⟧
∥ hfiber
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d))) f ∥

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
c, d: Quotcategory_ob_mor
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ c, d ⟧
∥ hfiber
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d))) f ∥

    use issurjsetquotpr.
  Qed.

  (** ** Composition of morphisms *)

  (** *** Some lemmas *)

  (** If images of f1 and f2 are equal, then f * inv f2 is mapped to unit. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: setquotpr H f1 = f
e2: setquotpr H f2 = f
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: setquotpr H f1 = f
e2: setquotpr H f2 = f
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: setquotpr H f1 = setquotpr H f2
e2: setquotpr H f2 = f
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: setquotpr H f1 = setquotpr H f2
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: (setquotpr H f1 - setquotpr H f2)%abgr =
(setquotpr H f2 - setquotpr H f2)%abgr
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
f1, f2: A
H: binopeqrel A
f: abgrquot H
e1: (setquotpr H f1 - setquotpr H f2)%abgr = 0
setquotpr H (f1 - f2)%abgr = setquotpr H 0
 apply e1.
  Qed.

  (** Equality on relation to refl *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: H g g = H f g
H f g

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: H g g = H f g
H f g

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
H g g

    apply eqrelrefl.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: setquotpr H f = setquotpr H g
H f g

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: setquotpr H f = setquotpr H g
H f g

    exact (abgrquotpr_rel_to_refl (! (funeqpaths (base_paths _ _ e)) g)).
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: H f g
setquotpr H f = setquotpr H g

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: H f g
setquotpr H f = setquotpr H g

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
H: binopeqrel A
f, g: A
e: H f g
H f g

    exact e.
  Qed.

  (** *** Morphisms to elements of groups *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
pr1 (PAS a b)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
pr1 (PAS a b)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(a --> b)%abgrcat
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(λ x : (a --> b)%abgrcat, pr1 (PAS a b) x) ?pr1

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(a --> b)%abgrcat
 exact f.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(λ x : (a --> b)%abgrcat, pr1 (PAS a b) x) f
 exact H.
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
pr1 (PAS a b)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
pr1 (PAS a b)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(a --> b)%abgrcat
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(λ x : (a --> b)%abgrcat, pr1 (PAS a b) x) ?pr1

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(a --> b)%abgrcat
 exact (@grinv (to_abgr a b) f).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
(λ x : (a --> b)%abgrcat, pr1 (PAS a b) x)
  ( - f)%abgrcat
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: pr1 (PAS a b) f
pr1 (PAS a b) f
 exact H.
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
tmp:= pr112 (PAS A B): issubsetwithbinop op (pr1 (PAS A B))
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
tmp:= pr112 (PAS A B): issubsetwithbinop (to_binop A B) (pr1 (PAS A B))
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
tmp:= pr112 (PAS A B): ∏ a a' : pr1 (PAS A B), pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
tmp:= pr112 (PAS A B): ∏ a a' : pr1 (PAS A B), pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
a:= mor_to_elem f H1: pr1 (PAS A B)
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H1: pr1 (PAS A B) f
H2: pr1 (PAS A B) g
tmp:= pr112 (PAS A B): ∏ a a' : pr1 (PAS A B), pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))
a:= mor_to_elem f H1: pr1 (PAS A B)
a':= mor_to_elem g H2: pr1 (PAS A B)
pr1 (PAS A B) (to_binop A B f g)

    apply (tmp a a').
  Qed.

  (** *** Composition of morphisms in the quotient precategory *)

  (** **** Structure for composition *)

  Definition QuotcategoryComp {A B C : ob PA} (f : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, B⟧)
             (g : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦B, C⟧) : UU :=
    ∑ h : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, C⟧,
          (∏ (f' : PA⟦A, B⟧) (e1 : setquotpr _ f' = f)
             (g' : PA⟦B, C⟧) (e2 : setquotpr _ g' = g), setquotpr _ (f' · g') = h).

  Definition make_QuotcategoryComp {A B C : ob PA} {f : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, B⟧}
             {g : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦B, C⟧} (h : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, C⟧)
             (H : ∏ (f' : PA⟦A, B⟧) (e1 : setquotpr _ f' = f)
                    (g' : PA⟦B, C⟧) (e2 : setquotpr _ g' = g), setquotpr _ (f' · g') = h) :
    QuotcategoryComp f g := tpair _ h H.

  Definition QuotcategoryCompMor {A B C : ob PA} {f : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, B⟧}
             {g : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦B, C⟧} (QPC : QuotcategoryComp f g) :
    Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, C⟧ := pr1 QPC.

  Definition QuotcategoryCompEq {A B C : ob PA} {f : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, B⟧}
             {g : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦B, C⟧} (QPC : QuotcategoryComp f g) :
    ∏ (f' : PA⟦A, B⟧) (e1 : setquotpr _ f' = f) (g' : PA⟦B, C⟧) (e2 : setquotpr _ g' = g),
    setquotpr _ (f' · g') = QuotcategoryCompMor QPC := pr2 QPC.


  (** **** Composition for quotient category *)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = a + c

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = a + c

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = (b - c)%abgr + c
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = b + ((- c)%abgr + c)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = b + 0
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A: abgr
a, b, c: A
e: a = (b - c)%abgr
b = b
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
e1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p: f'1 = pr1 t + f1
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
e1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p: f'1 = pr1 t + f1
e2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p': g'1 = pr1 t' + g1
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
e1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p: f'1 = pr1 t + f1
e2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p': g'1 = pr1 t' + g1
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( - ((pr1 t + f1)%addmonoid · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
e1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p: f'1 = pr1 t + f1
e2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS_eq p': g'1 = pr1 t' + g1
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      ((pr1 t + f1)%addmonoid
       · (pr1 t' + g1)%addmonoid)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      ((pr1 t + f1)%addmonoid
       · (pr1 t' + g1)%addmonoid)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      (to_binop A B (pr1 t) f1
       · to_binop B C (pr1 t') g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A B (pr1 t) f1 · pr1 t')%cat
        (to_binop A B (pr1 t) f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A B (pr1 t) f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: isassoc op
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : (A --> C)%abgrcat,
x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= commax (A --> C)%abgrcat: iscomm op
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= commax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' : (A --> C)%abgrcat, x + x' = x' + x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · g1)%cat (f1 · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)
        (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat (pr1 t · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C
           (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
              (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (f1 · g1)%cat)
        (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat
           (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
              (f1 · pr1 t')%cat)) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat
        (to_binop A C
           (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
              (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (to_binop A C (f1 · pr1 t')%cat
              (pr1 t · g1)%cat)))%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : (A --> C)%abgrcat,
( - (y1 + y2)%addmonoid)%abgrcat =
(( - y2)%abgrcat - y1)%abgr
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (to_binop A C (f1 · pr1 t')%cat
              (pr1 t · g1)%cat)))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     ( -
      to_binop A C (f1 · g1)%cat
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (to_binop A C (f1 · pr1 t')%cat
              (pr1 t · g1)%cat)))%abgrcat)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
     (to_binop A C
        ( -
         to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (to_binop A C (f1 · pr1 t')%cat
              (pr1 t · g1)%cat))%abgrcat
        ( - (f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat))

( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C
     (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
        ( -
         to_binop A C
           (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
              (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)
     ( - (f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA

t': pr1 (PAS B C)

g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧

to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')

i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat

  (to_binop A C ( - (f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat
     (to_binop A C (f1 · g1)
        ( -
         to_binop A C
           (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
              (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat))

t': pr1 (PAS B C)

g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')

        (f1 · g1))

           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
il:= linvax PA (f1 · g1): to_binop A C (to_inv (f1 · g1)) (f1 · g1) =
to_unel A C
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C
     (to_binop A C ( - (f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat
        (f1 · g1))
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat

to_unel A C
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C
     (to_binop A C ( - (f1 · g1)%cat)%abgrcat
        (f1 · g1))
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat

to_unel A C

  (to_binop A C (to_unel A C)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)

g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')

( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat

pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (to_unel A C)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')

i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : (A --> C)%abgrcat, 0%abgrcat + x = x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (to_unel A C)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
           (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat)

to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat

pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (to_unel A C)
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat

  (to_binop A C 0%abgrcat
     ( -
      to_binop A C
        (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat

 ∏ x : (A --> C)%abgrcat,
 pr1 (PAS A C) x → pr1 (PAS A C) ( - x)%abgrcat)
  (pr12 (PAS A C))
pr1 (PAS A C)
  ( -
   to_binop A C
     (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t')%cat
        (f1 · pr1 t')%cat) (pr1 t · g1)%cat)%abgrcat
