to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t') (f1 · pr1 t'))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (pr1 t · g1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C)
  (to_binop A C (pr1 t · pr1 t') (f1 · pr1 t'))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (pr1 t · pr1 t')
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (f1 · pr1 t')

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (pr1 t · pr1 t')
 apply (dirprod_pr1 (PAC A B) C (pr1 t) (pr2 t) (pr1 t')).
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (f1 · pr1 t')
 apply (dirprod_pr2 (PAC A B) C f1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t')).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
f1, f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
g1, g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
ac:= assocax (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ x x' x'' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C (to_binop A C x x') x'' =
to_binop A C x (to_binop A C x' x'')
comm:= pr2 (to_isabgrop A C): ∏ x x' : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
to_binop A C x x' = to_binop A C x' x
i:= grinvop (A --> C)%abgrcat: ∏ y1 y2 : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧,
( - to_binop A C y1 y2)%abgrcat =
to_binop A C ( - y2)%abgrcat ( - y1)%abgrcat
lu:= to_lunax A C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, C ⟧, to_binop A C 0%abgrcat x = x
pr1 (PAS A C) (pr1 t · g1)
 apply (dirprod_pr1 (PAC A B) C (pr1 t) (pr2 t) g1).
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
∏ f' : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
  setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g' = g
  → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f' · g') =
    setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f'1 · g'1)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
∏ f' : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
  setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g' = g
  → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f' · g') =
    setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C)) (f1 · g1) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
  (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
setquotpr
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
     (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C)))
  (f1 · g1) =
setquotpr
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
     (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C)))
  (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH:= abgrquotpr_rels_to_unel f''1 Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH:= abgrquotpr_rels_to_unel f''1 Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  0%abgrcat
HH':= abgrquotpr_rels_to_unel g''1 Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH':= abgrquotpr_rels_to_unel g''1 Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
isaprop
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
     (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
     (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
(∑ b : PAS A B, pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr)
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
    (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
    (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
(∑ b : PAS A B, pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr)
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
    (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
    (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH: binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B) 
  (f'1 - f1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
isaprop
  (make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
     (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
     (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
(∑ b : PAS B C, pr1 b = (g'1 - g1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr)
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
    (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
    (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
(∑ b : PAS B C, pr1 b = (g'1 - g1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr)
→ make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
    (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
    (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HH': binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C) 
  (g'1 - g1)%abgr 0%abgrcat
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
HHH': ∑ b : PAS B C,
pr1 b = (g'1 - g1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HHH: ∑ b : PAS A B,
pr1 b = (f'1 - f1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
HHH': ∑ b : PAS B C,
pr1 b = (g'1 - g1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HHH: ∑ b : pr1 (PAS A B),
pr1 b =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
HHH': ∑ b : PAS B C,
pr1 b = (g'1 - g1 - 0%abgrcat)%abgr
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
HHH: ∑ b : pr1 (PAS A B),
pr1 b =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
HHH': ∑ b : pr1 (PAS B C),
pr1 b =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
HHH': ∑ b : pr1 (PAS B C),
pr1 b =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  ( - 0)%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax A B: isrunit op 0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax A B: ∏ x : (A --> B)%abgrcat, x + 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t =
to_binop A B (to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax A B: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧, to_binop A B x 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax A B: ∏ x : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧, to_binop A B x 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax B C: isrunit op 0%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax B C: ∏ x : (B --> C)%abgrcat, x + 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' =
to_binop B C (to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat)
  0%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax B C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧, to_binop B C x 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
tmp:= to_runax B C: ∏ x : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧, to_binop B C x 0%abgrcat = x
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
make_eqrel (subgrhrel (PAS A C))
  (iseqrel_subgrhrel (A --> C)%abgrcat (PAS A C))
  (f1 · g1) (f'1 · g'1)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
∑ b : PAS A C, pr1 b = (f1 · g1 - f'1 · g'1)%abgr

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
PAS A C
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(λ b : PAS A C, pr1 b = (f1 · g1 - f'1 · g'1)%abgr)
  ?pr1

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
PAS A C
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(A --> C)%abgrcat
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(λ x : (A --> C)%abgrcat, PAS A C x) ?pr1

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(A --> C)%abgrcat
 exact (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) (grinv (to_abgr A C) (f'1 · g'1))).
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(λ x : (A --> C)%abgrcat, PAS A C x)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat)
 apply (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS p p').
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f'1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
f''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))
  f'1 = f
g'1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
g''1: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))
  g'1 = g
f1: PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
Hf: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
Hg: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g1 =
g
t: pr1 (PAS A B)
p: pr1 t = to_binop A B f'1 ( - f1)%abgrcat
t': pr1 (PAS B C)
p': pr1 t' = to_binop B C g'1 ( - g1)%abgrcat
(λ b : PAS A C, pr1 b = (f1 · g1 - f'1 · g'1)%abgr)
  (to_binop A C (f1 · g1) ( - (f'1 · g'1)%cat)%abgrcat,,
   Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_PAS p p')
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
∏ t : QuotcategoryComp f g,
t =
make_QuotcategoryComp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f'
      · hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g'))
  (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g'))

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
∏ t : QuotcategoryComp f g,
t =
make_QuotcategoryComp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f'
      · hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g'))
  (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g'))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
t =
make_QuotcategoryComp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f'
      · hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g'))
  (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g'))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
pr1 t =
pr1
  (make_QuotcategoryComp
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f'
         · hfiberpr1
             (setquotpr
                (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
             g'))
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
transportf
  (λ x : Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧,
   ∏ f' : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
   setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f' = f
   → ∏ g' : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g' =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (f' · g') = x) ?p (pr2 t) =
pr2
  (make_QuotcategoryComp
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f'
         · hfiberpr1
             (setquotpr
                (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
             g'))
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
pr1 t =
pr1
  (make_QuotcategoryComp
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f'
         · hfiberpr1
             (setquotpr
                (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
             g'))
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')))
 exact (! (pr2 t (hfiberpr1 _ _ f') (hfiberpr2 _ _ f') (hfiberpr1 _ _ g') (hfiberpr2 _ _ g'))).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
transportf
  (λ x : Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧,
   ∏ f' : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
   setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f' = f
   → ∏ g' : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g' =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (f' · g') = x)
  (! pr2 t
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
       (hfiberpr2
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
       (hfiberpr2
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g'))
  (pr2 t) =
pr2
  (make_QuotcategoryComp
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f'
         · hfiberpr1
             (setquotpr
                (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
             g'))
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f f')
        (hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
        (hfiberpr2
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
isaprop
  (∏ f'0 : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
   setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f'0 =
   f
   → ∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (f'0 · g'0) =
       pr1
         (make_QuotcategoryComp
            (setquotpr
               (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f'
                · hfiberpr1
                    (setquotpr
                       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
                          (PAS B C))) g g'))
            (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g'))))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
∏ t : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
isofhlevel 1
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t = f
   → ∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (t · g'0) =
       pr1
         (make_QuotcategoryComp
            (setquotpr
               (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f'
                · hfiberpr1
                    (setquotpr
                       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
                          (PAS B C))) g g'))
            (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g'))))

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

   → ∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (t' · g'0) =

               (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))

                  f f'

               (hfiberpr1

               (hfiberpr2

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps

g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
t': PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t' = f
→ isofhlevel 1
    (∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
     setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 =
     g
     → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
         (t' · g'0) =
       pr1
         (make_QuotcategoryComp
            (setquotpr
               (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f'
                · hfiberpr1
                    (setquotpr
                       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
                          (PAS B C))) g g'))
            (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                  f f')
               (hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g')
               (hfiberpr2
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g'))))

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
t': PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t' =
f
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
   setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 =
   g
   → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
       (t' · g'0) =
     pr1
       (make_QuotcategoryComp
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f'
              · hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g'))
          (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f')
             (hfiberpr2
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f')
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g')
             (hfiberpr2
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g'))))

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g

H: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t' =
f
∏ t : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
isofhlevel 1
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) t = g
   → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
       (t' · t) =
     pr1
       (make_QuotcategoryComp
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f'
              · hfiberpr1

                f f')

                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f')
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g')
             (hfiberpr2
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g'))))

f
t0: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) t0 = g
   → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
       (t' · t0) =

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
t': PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t' =
f
t0: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) t0 = g
→ isofhlevel 1
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
       (t' · t0) =
     pr1
       (make_QuotcategoryComp
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f'
              · hfiberpr1
                  (setquotpr
                     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                  g g'))
          (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f')
             (hfiberpr2
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
                f f')
             (hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g')
             (hfiberpr2
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g'))))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
t: QuotcategoryComp f g
t': PA ⟦ A, B ⟧
H: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) t' =
f
t0: PA ⟦ B, C ⟧
H0: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) t0 =
g
isofhlevel 1
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
     (t' · t0) =
   pr1
     (make_QuotcategoryComp
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
           (hfiberpr1
              (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f
              f'
            · hfiberpr1
                (setquotpr
                   (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
                g g'))
        (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
           (hfiberpr1
              (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f
              f')
           (hfiberpr2
              (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B))) f
              f')
           (hfiberpr1
              (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
              g')
           (hfiberpr2
              (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g
              g'))))

      apply isasetsetquot.
  Qed.

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)

  g
