PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
∏ f'0 : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f'0 = f
→ ∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
  setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 = g
  → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f'0 · g'0) = ?h

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧
 exact (setquotpr
                 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C)) ((hfiberpr1 _ _ f') · (hfiberpr1 _ _ g'))).
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
∏ f'0 : PA ⟦ A, B ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)) f'0 = f
→ ∏ g'0 : PA ⟦ B, C ⟧,
  setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)) g'0 = g
  → setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (f'0 · g'0) =
    setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
      (hfiberpr1
         (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
         f f'
       · hfiberpr1
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g')
 exact (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq
                 f g (hfiberpr1 _ _ f') (hfiberpr2 _ _ f') (hfiberpr1 _ _ g') (hfiberpr2 _ _ g')).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
  g
∏ t : QuotcategoryComp f g,
t =
make_QuotcategoryComp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A C))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f'
      · hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C))) g g'))
  (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr_eq f g
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A B)))
        f f')
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g')
     (hfiberpr2
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS B C)))
        g g'))
 exact (QuotPrecatetgory_comp_iscontr_univ f g f' g').
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
A, B, C: PA
f: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, B ⟧
g: Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ B, C ⟧
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ A, C ⟧

    exact (QuotcategoryCompMor (iscontrpr1 (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g))).
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ x, y ⟧

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ x, y ⟧

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
(x --> y)%abgrcat
 exact f.
  Defined.


  (** ** Some equations on linearity, compositions, and binops *)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) =
to_quot_mor (f · g)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) =
to_quot_mor (f · g)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (f · g)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           f)
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           g))) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (f · g)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (f · g) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           f)
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           g)))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
 apply idpath.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Pre- and postcomposition respect binop. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)) =
?b
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)) =
?b
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (to_quot_mor (f · g))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor h)) =
?b
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (to_quot_mor (f · g)) (to_quot_mor (f · h)) = ?b

      use setquotfun2comm.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
tmp:= setquotfun2comm
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (eqreltrans
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))): ∏ x x' : (y --> z)%abgrcat,
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
(binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
(iscompbinoptransrel (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
(eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
(pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) x)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) x') =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z x x')
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) g)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
tmp:= setquotfun2comm
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (eqreltrans
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))): ∏ x x' : (y --> z)%abgrcat,
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
(binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z)
(iscompbinoptransrel (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
(eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
(pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))))
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) x)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) x') =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) (to_binop y z x x')
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_binop y z g h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_binop y z g h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_binop y z g h)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_binop y z g h)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_binop y z g h) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_binop y z g h))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_binop y z g h) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_binop y z g h))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_binop y z g h) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           f)
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           (to_binop y z g h))))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z g h)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
 apply idpath.
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_binop y z g h)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h)
  (to_quot_mor f) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h)
  (to_quot_mor f) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h)
  (to_quot_mor f) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f) +
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f) =
Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g + to_quot_mor h)
  (to_quot_mor f)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) (to_binop x y)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h)) (to_quot_mor f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)) =
?b
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) (to_binop x y)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h)) (to_quot_mor f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor f))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)) =
?b
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (to_quot_mor (g · f))
  (Quotcategory_comp (to_quot_mor h) (to_quot_mor f)) =
?b
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)) (to_binop x z)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
     (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z)))
     (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))))
  (to_quot_mor (g · f)) (to_quot_mor (h · f)) = ?b

      use setquotfun2comm.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) (to_binop x y)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))))
     (to_quot_mor g) (to_quot_mor h)) (to_quot_mor f)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotfun2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) (to_binop x y)
     (iscompbinoptransrel
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
        (eqreltrans (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        (pr2 (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))))
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) g)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) h))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_binop x y g h))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_binop x y g h))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           (to_binop x y g h))
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           f)))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_binop x y g h · f) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           (to_binop x y g h))
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           f)))

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_binop x y g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_binop x y g h)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_binop x y g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_binop x y g h)
 apply idpath.
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Composing with the unit element gives the unit element. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_unel y z)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x z)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_unel y z)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x z)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_unel y z)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_unel y z)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_unel y z) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
     (to_unel y z))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (f · to_unel y z) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           f)
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           (to_unel y z))))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_unel y z) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_unel y z)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)) f
 apply idpath.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_unel y z) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
  (to_unel y z)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_unel x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x z)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_unel x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x z)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_unel x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x y · f)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x y · f) =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (to_unel x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x z))
  (to_unel x y · f) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
           (to_unel x y))
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
           f)))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y)
 apply idpath.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: PA ⟦ y, z ⟧
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)) f
 apply idpath.
  Qed.


  (** ** Construction of the Quotcategory *)

  Definition Quotcategory_data : precategory_data :=
    make_precategory_data
      Quotcategory_ob_mor
      (λ (A : ob PA), setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS A A)) (identity A))
      (fun (A B C : ob PA) (f : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦A, B⟧)
         (g : Quotcategory_ob_mor⟦B, C⟧) => Quotcategory_comp f g).

  (** The following two lemmas are used to show associaticity of composition in
      Quotcategory. *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1))

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
tmp:= pr21 ic3: (λ h : Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ a, d ⟧,
∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, b ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ b, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b d)) g' = pr11 ic2
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = h) (pr11 ic3)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps

f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
tmp:= pr21 ic3: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, b ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ b, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b d)) g' = pr11 ic2
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic3
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
tmp:= pr21 ic3: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, b ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ b, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b d)) g' = pr11 ic2
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic3
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f
        (QuotcategoryCompMor
           (iscontrpr1 (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h)))))

h

  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f
        (QuotcategoryCompMor (iscontrpr1 ic2))))

h

→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic3
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 = f
 exact f2.

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
tmp:= pr21 ic3: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, b ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ b, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b d)) g' = pr11 ic2
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic3
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 = g
 exact g2.
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic2:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr g h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp g h)
ic3:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f (pr11 ic2): iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f (pr11 ic2))
tmp:= pr21 ic3: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, b ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f' = f
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ b, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b d)) g' = pr11 ic2
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic3
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 = h
 exact h2.
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h

  (f1 · g1 · h1) =

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: (λ h0 : Quotcategory_ob_mor ⟦ a, d ⟧,
∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = h0) (pr11 ic4)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (QuotcategoryCompMor
           (iscontrpr1 (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g)))
        h))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data

h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f

g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h

ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (QuotcategoryCompMor (iscontrpr1 ic1)) h))

→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4

→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,

→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 = g

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 = f
 exact f2.
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 = g
 exact g2.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
ic1:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr f g: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp f g)
ic4:= Quotcategory_comp_iscontr (pr11 ic1) h: iscontr (QuotcategoryComp (pr11 ic1) h)
tmp:= pr21 ic4: ∏ f' : PA ⟦ a, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a c)) f' = pr11 ic1
→ ∏ g' : PA ⟦ c, d ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) g' = h
→ setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d)) (f' · g') = pr11 ic4
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 = h
 exact h2.
  Qed.

  (** Quotcategory is a precategory *)
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
is_precategory Quotcategory_data

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
is_precategory Quotcategory_data

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
 (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f)
× (∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
   (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   f · identity b = f)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
 (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
× (∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
   (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   f · g · h = f · (g · h))

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
 (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f)
× (∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
   (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧),
   f · identity b = f)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · identity b = f

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
identity a · f = f

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f = identity a · f

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f =
Quotcategory_comp
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
     (identity a)) f

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

f =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
           (identity a)) f))

f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
f =

  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))

PA: PreAdditive

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
isaprop
  (f =
   QuotcategoryCompMor
     (iscontrpr1
        (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
           (setquotpr
              (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
              (identity a)) f)))
PA: PreAdditive

f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
→ f =
  QuotcategoryCompMor
    (iscontrpr1
       (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
             (identity a)) f))

  f

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
f =

  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr

           (identity a)) f))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
f =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
           (identity a)) f))

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f1: (a --> b)%abgrcat
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
f =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
           (identity a)) f))

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =

     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: PA
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))
  (identity a · f1) =
QuotcategoryCompMor
  (iscontrpr1
     (Quotcategory_comp_iscontr
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a a))
           (identity a))
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))
           f1)))

  (identity a)

  (identity a)

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
 (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
× (∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
   (f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
   (h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
   f · g · h = f · (g · h))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps

f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b))) f ∥
isaprop
  (Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
   Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h)

  f

  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
g'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c))) g ∥
isaprop
  (Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h) =
   Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h)

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1)

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1)
 apply idpath.
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (a b c d : Quotcategory_data)
(f : Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧),
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · g · h = f · (g · h)

f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)))
  g
h'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d))) h ∥
isaprop
  (Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
   Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h))
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)))
  g
h'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d))) h ∥
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)))
  h
→ Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
  Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data

  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)))
  f
g': hfiber

  g

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: (a --> b)%abgrcat
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)))
  h
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: (a --> b)%abgrcat
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: (b --> c)%abgrcat
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)))
  h
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: (a --> b)%abgrcat
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: (b --> c)%abgrcat
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: (c --> d)%abgrcat
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
Quotcategory_comp f (Quotcategory_comp g h)

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
Quotcategory_comp (Quotcategory_comp f g) h =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1))

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · g1 · h1) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1))

        
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b, c, d: Quotcategory_data
f: Quotcategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Quotcategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: Quotcategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f1: PA ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a b)) f1 =
f
g1: PA ⟦ b, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS b c)) g1 =
g
h1: PA ⟦ c, d ⟧
h2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c d)) h1 =
h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a d))
  (f1 · (g1 · h1))
 apply idpath.
  Defined.

  Definition Quotprecategory : precategory :=
    tpair _ _ is_precategory_Quotcategory_data.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
has_homsets Quotprecategory

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
has_homsets Quotprecategory

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
a, b: Quotprecategory
isaset (Quotprecategory ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 apply isasetsetquot.
  Qed.

  Definition Quotcategory : category := make_category Quotprecategory has_homsets_Quotcategory.

  (** ** Quotient precategory of PreAdditive is PreAdditive *)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs

precategoryWithBinOps

precategoryWithBinOps

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
category
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
precategoryWithBinOpsData ?C

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
category
 exact Quotcategory.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
precategoryWithBinOpsData Quotcategory
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: Quotcategory
binop (Quotcategory ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 exact (@op (subabgr_quot (PAS x y))).
  Defined.

  Unset Kernel Term Sharing.
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
categoryWithAbgrops

categoryWithAbgrops

precategoryWithBinOps
PA: PreAdditive

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
categoryWithAbgropsData ?PB

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
precategoryWithBinOps
 exact Quotcategory_binops.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
categoryWithAbgropsData Quotcategory_binops
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: Quotcategory_binops
isabgrop (to_binop x y)
 exact (pr2 (subabgr_quot (PAS x y))).
  Defined.
  Set Kernel Term Sharing.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y) = 0%abgrcat

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y) = 0%abgrcat

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Local Opaque to_abgr.
  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop
  (f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h))

f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧

hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
→ f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps

f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))

  h
→ f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  g
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  h
→ f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  h
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (hfiberpr1
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))) f
     f') · to_binop y z g h =
to_binop x z
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f') · g)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f') · h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (hfiberpr1
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))) f
     f')
· to_binop y z
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) g g'))
    h =
to_binop x z
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) g g'))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f') · h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  h
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (hfiberpr1
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))) f
     f')
· to_binop y z
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) g g'))
    (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) h h')) =
to_binop x z
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) g g'))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        f f')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) h h'))

    exact (Quotcategory_premor (hfiberpr1 _ _ f') (hfiberpr1 _ _ g') (hfiberpr1 _ _ h')).
  Qed.

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · to_unel y z = to_unel x z

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  f
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (hfiberpr1
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))) f
     f') · to_unel y z = to_unel x z

    exact (@quot_comp_unel_left x y z (hfiberpr1 _ _ f')).
  Qed.

g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  g

  h

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  h
to_binop x y g h
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
    (hfiberpr1
       (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
       f f') =
to_binop x z
  (g
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))
  (h
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  h
to_binop x y
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        g g')) h
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
    (hfiberpr1
       (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
       f f') =
to_binop x z
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        g g')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))
  (h
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  g
h': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
  h
to_binop x y
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        g g'))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        h h'))
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
    (hfiberpr1
       (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
       f f') =
to_binop x z
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        g g')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
     (hfiberpr1
        (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y)))
        h h')
   · setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
       (hfiberpr1
          (setquotpr
             (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))) f f'))

    exact (Quotcategory_postmor (hfiberpr1 _ _ f') (hfiberpr1 _ _ g') (hfiberpr1 _ _ h')).
  Qed.

PAC: PreAdditiveComps

f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_unel x y · f = to_unel x z

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
  f
to_unel x y
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z))
    (hfiberpr1
       (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y z)))
       f f') = to_unel x z

    exact (@quot_comp_unel_right x y z (hfiberpr1 _ _ f')).
  Qed.

PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g h : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · to_binop y z g h = to_binop x z (f · g) (f · h)
 exact (PreAdditive_pre_linear x y z f g h).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_premor z f (to_unel y z) = to_unel x z
 exact (PreAdditive_pre_unel x y z f).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(g h : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
g, h: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_binop x y g h · f = to_binop x z (g · f) (h · f)
 exact (PreAdditive_post_linear x y z f g h).
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
∏ (x y z : Quotcategory_abgrops)
(f : Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: Quotcategory_abgrops
f: Quotcategory_abgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_premor z (to_unel x y) f = to_unel x z
 exact (PreAdditive_post_unel x y z f).
  Qed.

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
isPreAdditive ?PA

categoryWithAbgrops
 exact Quotcategory_abgrops.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
isPreAdditive Quotcategory_abgrops
 exact Quotcategory_isPreAdditive.
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_quot_mor (to_binop x y f g) =
to_binop x y (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y: PA
f, g: PA ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_quot_mor (to_binop x y f g) =
to_binop x y (to_quot_mor f) (to_quot_mor g)

    exact (pr1 (abgrquotpr_ismonoidfun (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))) f g).
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp f g = f · g

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, y, z: PA
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ y, z ⟧
Quotcategory_comp f g = f · g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  (** ** The canonical functor to Quotcategory *)
  (** This functor is identity on objects and sends morphisms to the equivalence class they
      represent. *)

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
PA → Quotcategory_PreAdditive
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(λ F : PA → Quotcategory_PreAdditive,
 ∏ a b : PA,
 PA ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
PA → Quotcategory_PreAdditive
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X: PA
Quotcategory_PreAdditive
 exact X.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(λ F : PA → Quotcategory_PreAdditive,
 ∏ a b : PA,
 PA ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ X : PA, X)
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X, Y: PA
f: PA ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Quotcategory_PreAdditive ⟦ X, Y ⟧
 exact (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS X Y)) f).
  Defined.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
is_functor QuotcategoryFunctor_data

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
is_functor QuotcategoryFunctor_data

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_idax QuotcategoryFunctor_data
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_compax QuotcategoryFunctor_data

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_idax QuotcategoryFunctor_data
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
X: PA
# QuotcategoryFunctor_data (identity X) =
identity (QuotcategoryFunctor_data X)
 apply idpath.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_compax QuotcategoryFunctor_data
 
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
x, Y, Z: PA
f: PA ⟦ x, Y ⟧
g: PA ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
# QuotcategoryFunctor_data (f · g) =
# QuotcategoryFunctor_data f
· # QuotcategoryFunctor_data g
 exact (! (Quotcategory_comp_linear f g)).
  Qed.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
PA ⟶ Quotcategory_PreAdditive

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
PA ⟶ Quotcategory_PreAdditive

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(λ F : functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive,
 is_functor F) ?pr1

    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive
 exact QuotcategoryFunctor_data.
    
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
(λ F : functor_data PA Quotcategory_PreAdditive,
 is_functor F) QuotcategoryFunctor_data
 exact QuotcategoryFunctor_isfunctor.
  Defined.


  (** ** If PA has a zero object, then so does Quotcategory of PA *)

  Variable Z : Zero PA.

  
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
isZero Z

isZero Z

Z: Zero PA
∏ a : Quotcategory, iscontr (Quotcategory ⟦ a, Z ⟧)

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
iscontr (Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧)

      
PA: PreAdditive

PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
(λ cntr : Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧,
 ∏ t : Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧, t = cntr) ?pr1

      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧
 exact (to_quot_mor (@ZeroArrowFrom PA Z a)).
      
PA: PreAdditive
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs
PAC: PreAdditiveComps
Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
(λ cntr : Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧,
 ∏ t : Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧, t = cntr)
  (to_quot_mor (ZeroArrowFrom a))

t = to_quot_mor (ZeroArrowFrom a)

Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
t: Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧
t'1:= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS Z a)) t: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS Z a))) t ∥
t = to_quot_mor (ZeroArrowFrom a)

isaprop (t = to_quot_mor (ZeroArrowFrom a))

Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory

t1: (Z --> a)%abgrcat

t

PA: PreAdditive

a: Quotcategory
t: Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧

PA: PreAdditive

Z: Zero PA
a: Quotcategory
t: Quotcategory ⟦ Z, a ⟧
t1: (Z --> a)%abgrcat
t2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS Z a)) t1 =
t
t1 = ZeroArrowFrom a

        apply ArrowsFromZero.

t1: (a --> Z)%abgrcat
t2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS a Z)) t1 =
t
t1 = ZeroArrowTo a

        apply ArrowsToZero.
  Qed.
