 exact Quotcategory_isZero.
  Defined.

End preadditive_quotient.


M: PreAdditive
PreAdditive


M: PreAdditive
PreAdditive

  
M: PreAdditive
isPreAdditive (oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M)

  
M: PreAdditive
∏ (x y z : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M)
(f : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
M: PreAdditive
∏ (x y z : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M)
(f : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

  
M: PreAdditive
∏ (x y z : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M)
(f : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
 exact (λ a b c f, @to_postmor_monoid (pr1 M) (pr2 M) (rm_opp_ob c) (rm_opp_ob b) (rm_opp_ob a) (rm_opp_mor f)).
  
M: PreAdditive
∏ (x y z : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M)
(f : oppositeCategoryWithAbgrops M ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
 exact (λ a b c f, @to_premor_monoid (pr1 M) (pr2 M) (rm_opp_ob c) (rm_opp_ob b) (rm_opp_ob a) (rm_opp_mor f)).
Defined.


M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
PreAdditive


M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
PreAdditive

  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
isPreAdditive (induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j)

  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
∏ (x y z : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j)
(f : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
∏ (x y z : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j)
(f : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
∏ (x y z : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j)
(f : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
 exact (λ a b c, @to_premor_monoid (pr1 M) (pr2 M) (j a) (j b) (j c)).
  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
∏ (x y z : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j)
(f : induced_categoryWithAbgrops M j ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
 exact (λ a b c, @to_postmor_monoid (pr1 M) (pr2 M) (j a) (j b) (j c)).
Defined.




M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
oppositePreAdditive (induced_PreAdditive M j) =
induced_PreAdditive (oppositePreAdditive M)
  (λ a : X, opp_ob (j a))


M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
oppositePreAdditive (induced_PreAdditive M j) =
induced_PreAdditive (oppositePreAdditive M)
  (λ a : X, opp_ob (j a))

  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
oppositePreAdditive (induced_PreAdditive M j) =
induced_PreAdditive (oppositePreAdditive M)
  (λ a : X, opp_ob (j a))

  
M: PreAdditive
X: Type
j: X → M
((((((X,,
      (λ a b : X, (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))),,
     (λ c : X, (pr121 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c)),,
     (λ (a b c : X)
      (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
      (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b)),
      (pr221 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b) (j a) g f)),,
    ((λ a b : X, (pr212 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a)),,
     (λ a b : X, (pr112 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))),,
    (λ (a b c d : X)
     (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
     (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b))
     (h : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c)),
     (pr222 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c) (j b) (j a) h
       g f),,
    (λ (a b c d : X)
     (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
     (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b))
     (h : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c)),
     (pr122 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c) (j b) (j a) h
       g f)),,
   (λ a b : X, (pr211 (pr1 M)) (j b) (j a))),,
  (λ (A B : X)
   (f g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j B) (j A)),
   (pr211 M) (j B) (j A) f g)),,
 (λ a b : X, (pr21 M) (j b) (j a))),,
(λ (a b c : X)
 (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a)),
 (pr22 M) (j c) (j b) (j a) f),,
(λ (a b c : X)
 (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b)),
 (pr12 M) (j c) (j b) (j a) f) =
((((((X,,
      (λ a b : X, (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))),,
     (λ c : X, (pr121 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c)),,
     (λ (a b c : X)
      (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
      (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b)),
      (pr221 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b) (j a) g f)),,
    ((λ a b : X, (pr212 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a)),,
     (λ a b : X, (pr112 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))),,
    (λ (a b c d : X)
     (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
     (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b))
     (h : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c)),
     (pr222 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c) (j b) (j a) h
       g f),,
    (λ (a b c d : X)
     (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a))
     (g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b))
     (h : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c)),
     (pr122 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j d) (j c) (j b) (j a) h
       g f)),,
   (λ a b : X, (pr211 (pr1 M)) (j b) (j a))),,
  (λ (a b : X)
   (f g : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a)),
   (pr211 M) (j b) (j a) f g)),,
 (λ a b : X, (pr21 M) (j b) (j a))),,
(λ (a b c : X)
 (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j b) (j a)),
 (pr22 M) (j c) (j b) (j a) f),,
(λ (a b c : X)
 (f : (pr211 (pr111 (pr1 M))) (j c) (j b)),
 (pr12 M) (j c) (j b) (j a) f)

  apply idpath.                (* but the computation may make this proof fragile *)
Defined.

Section RewritingAids.
  Local Open Scope abgrcat.
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: b --> c
((0 : (a --> b)%abgrcat) · f)%cat = 0

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: b --> c
((0 : (a --> b)%abgrcat) · f)%cat = 0

    apply to_postmor_unel'.
  Defined.
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
((f · (0 : (b --> c)%abgrcat))%cat = 0)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
((f · (0 : (b --> c)%abgrcat))%cat = 0)%type

    apply to_premor_unel'.
  Defined.
  Definition leftCompIsHomo {M:PreAdditive} {a b : M} (f : a --> b) (c:M) : ismonoidfun (to_premor c f)
    := @to_premor_monoid _ M _ _ _ _.
  Definition rightCompIsHomo {M:PreAdditive} {b c : M} (a:M) (f : b --> c) : ismonoidfun (to_postmor a f)
    := @to_postmor_monoid _ M _ _ _ _.
  Definition leftCompHomo {M:PreAdditive} {a b : M} (f : a --> b) (c:M) : monoidfun (b-->c) (a-->c)
    := make_monoidfun (to_premor_monoid M _ _ _ f).
  Definition rightCompHomo {M:PreAdditive} {b c : M} (a:M) (f : b --> c) : monoidfun (a-->b) (a-->c)
    := make_monoidfun (to_postmor_monoid M _ _ _ f).
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g, h: b --> c
((f · (g + h))%cat = (f · g)%cat + (f · h)%cat)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g, h: b --> c
((f · (g + h))%cat = (f · g)%cat + (f · h)%cat)%type

    apply leftCompIsHomo.
  Qed.
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f, g: a --> b
h: b --> c
(((f + g) · h)%cat = (f · h)%cat + (g · h)%cat)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f, g: a --> b
h: b --> c
(((f + g) · h)%cat = (f · h)%cat + (g · h)%cat)%type

    apply rightCompIsHomo.
  Qed.
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g: b --> c
((f ·  - g)%cat =  - (f · g)%cat)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g: b --> c
((f ·  - g)%cat =  - (f · g)%cat)%type

    exact (binopfun_preserves_inv (leftCompHomo f c) (binopfunisbinopfun _) g).
  Qed.
  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g: b --> c
(( - f · g)%cat =  - (f · g)%cat)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
a, b, c: M
f: a --> b
g: b --> c
(( - f · g)%cat =  - (f · g)%cat)%type

    exact (binopfun_preserves_inv (rightCompHomo a g) (binopfunisbinopfun _) f).
  Qed.
End RewritingAids.
